$comment: MCP servers for this project. Supabase points at the 'sparx studio' project (asharara88 org). Claude-in-Chrome drives a real browser for supervised steps. The pipeline uses Playwright for automated browser runs.

supabase.$note: Authenticate after adding: run `claude /mcp`, select supabase, Authenticate. Equivalent CLI: claude mcp add --scope project --transport http supabase "https://mcp.supabase.com/mcp?project_ref=nmazktgrwachwjfewxdn"

claude-in-chrome.$note: Interactive/supervised browser control via the Claude in Chrome extension.
